quicksight.dataset.columnlevelpermission: A rule defined to grant access on one or more restricted columns. Each dataset can have multiple rules. To create a restricted column, you add it to one or more rules. Each rule must contain at least one column and at least one user or group. To be able to see a restricted column, a user or group needs to be added to a rule for that column.

quicksight.dataset.columnlevelpermission.Description: An array of Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) for Amazon QuickSight users or groups.
